name: Asthosus
author: Catser
description:
A mod that adds a new planet, Asthosus, into the game.
  
Asthosus is a deserted planet. A wasteland filled with danger.
It has a fully playable campaign with 11 campaign and 21 optional maps. 

Aside from these 32 maps, Asthosus contains over 180 pieces of unique content,
including blocks, liquids, items, units and status effects.
This number is not counting any internal units or environment blocks/tiles.

I aimed to re-use nearly no vanilla content and instead fill the mod 
with new and (hopefully) exciting things.

The mod comes with it's own custom music, made by ThePythonGuy3!

If you find any issues or want to tell me anything else,
feel free to join the Asthosus Discord server. 
The same thing goes for when you need help with this mod.

Asthosus is available in the following languages:
- English
- German
- Indonesian
- Russian
- Ukrainian
- Traditional Chinese
- Simplified Chinese

Enjoy!

name: Helium
author: EBwilson
description:
A mod provide optimized ui and more utilities.
Major features:
- ***In-Game Entity Information Components***: Provides various UI elements for game entities including units and blocks
- ***Health & Status Indicators***: Displays real-time status (health, shields) above units and entities. When shield stacks exceed max health, multi-layer shields with stack counters are shown.
- ***Attack Range Indicators***: Units and turrets now visualize their attack ranges as translucent areas. Processed boundaries emphasize combined team range contours to prevent visual clutter, with subtle pulsating animations and chromatic borders.
- ***Functional Block Effect Range Indicators***: Devices like Mend Projectors, Overdrive Projectors, and unit repair stations display effect ranges with distinctive colors.
- ***Enhanced Block Placement Panel***: A refined block selection panel integrating a quick item bar and standardized tool buttons.
- ***The better Mod Manager and Mod Browser***: Reworked the Mods Manager and Mods Browser, now they looks more aesthetically pleasing and functional

name: Azimut
author: DeerCarbonate
description:
A hybrid mod primarily built around Erekir and its linear progression system. The mod introduces new gameplay mechanics that are tightly integrated into the campaign and accompany you throughout the entire playthrough.
The mod also has a Discord server — you can find the link in the README file on the GitHub page.

THIS MOD IS STILL IN DEVELOPMENT!
At the moment, development is approximately 47% complete and features 9 fully polished sectors.

////////////////////////////////

Land on a subcryogenic terra, gradually warming under its star, known as Gelion.
Your objective is to eliminate enemy forces on the planet, secure rare resources, and continue your expansion across the galaxy.

Limited space and complex logistics present a serious challenge. Plan your production wisely!

If you enjoy the mod, consider giving it a star! >~<
Thanks for playing!

[#ff]retodera[] - основатель мода и единственный работающий над ним

А также благодарности:

xDer - генератор идей

Призрак - основатель сервера Дискорд

nadocd - иногда помогает с кодом

description:
<RU>[]

[#00fff2]Technologium[] будет очередным большим модом для Mindustry. Уже многое запланировано, хотя практически ничто из этого не сделано.



Мод будет содержать в себе 2 солнечные системы, может даже больше; множество новых механик, много кампаний, ещё больше блоков, особенно предметов, жидкостей, юнитов и не только.

Пока что, только один человек - retodera - работает над модом. Но, если вы хороший спрайтер/кодер, вы можете помочь мне с всем этим. 
Если это не так, вы всё ещё можете мотивировать меня, поставив звёздочку на репозитории.

Вы также можете присоединиться к нашему говносерверу Дискорд в репозитории.

[#7f7f7f]Мод должен расти.[]




<ENG>[]

[#00fff2]Technologium[] will be another big mod for Mindustry. There's already so much planned, though practically none of it is finished.



The mod will contain a whole 2 solar systems, or maybe even more; lots of new mechanics, many campaigns, even more blocks, especially items, liquids, units and not only.

For now, only one person - retodera - works on the mod. But, if you're a good spriter/coder, you could help me with all of this. 
If not, you could still motivate me by giving a star on the repository.

You also could join our shitty Discord server in the repository.

[#7f7f7f]The mod must grow.[]

Dev - Blehhhh cat
Contributors - Kamikazefoxmk.i, Tinport, Aerodynamic Attorney 
Music Composer - Ace1020spawn
description:
A mod that adds a new planet, Kaltos, and its moon, Aetheria into the game.
  
[royal]Kaltos[] is an ancient and once life blooming planet. Now ruined by eras of industrial abuse, the life became scarce and the planet is undergoing constant ice ages. It's infested with ruins of ancient factions. 
[gold]Aetheria[] on the other hand, was always a deserted, hot celestial body. Thus resulting in 2 different factions present on [royal]Kaltos[] and [gold]Aetheria[]. 

[red]This mod is still in early development,[] as of now it only adds a bunch of [accent]sandbox only blocks[] and [accent]environment tiles[]. Several sectors have been made already, more are yet to come. It also has custom music. 

Other then that, the mod focuses on [accent]complex factories[] and [accent]refining Crude Oil[]. 

[accent]I re-used no content from vanilla, even though this mod seemingly has several things from it. 

[red]Currently the mod is way too early into development to have any proper translations. 

[]Have fun with whats already added, I guess. :)

name: Enhancement Units
author: D&X
description:
ATTENTION:

From now on, the mod goes into experimental mode - this means that the balance may not be balanced, such as a Toxopid with a Corvus, whose attack radii go far beyond 60 cells!!!!!
Nevertheless, I advise you to calm down: when the mod reaches its peak (despite my crazy plans for it, the result of which you are already watching), I will make several versions to meet the needs of as many people as possible. In the meantime, it remains to wait. Sorry for the inconvenience.

Important:

This mod does not bring anything radically new to the game, but only expands the combat functionality of existing combat units.

Please pay attention:

The mod significantly redesigns units, changes the balance and generally complicates the game. Don't forget to make a backup in case you don't like the changes that the mod itself makes.

P.S. The mod is made for ALE maps.

description:
[#90DBFF]原版扩展(VE)
[#90DBFF]Vanilla Expansion

[white]当前版本：[#FF835E]2.1.1.6 - 区块更新第五部分

[red]请及时跟进版本。
The newer the better.



[white]增加了少量原版科技树扩展内容以及塞普罗战役、行星发射终端后的一系列新内容。


[white]经过一段时间的战役，塞普罗上的敌军已遭受重创，然而这些敌方炮塔与单位只是按照简单逻辑行事的空壳，敌人的活跃部队早在反击开始之前就已通过行星际加速器抵达并驻扎在另一颗星球了。尽快拿下行星发射终端，做好准备，追击敌人。
[white]Enemies on Serpulo had been almost eradicated now. But these enemy facilities were just simple, unconscious dummies. The real, active army of Crux had already arrived at another planet far away from Serpulo through the interplanetary accelerator, slowly constructing new, more powerful bases there. Capture planetary launch terminal as soon as possible. And then, chase them.


[white]注：新内容剧情时期为终端后，占领行星发射终端才能进行新的战役，即使这些区块的难度并不对应终端后。
[white]Caution: Serpulo campaign (PLT&pre-PLT) fully completion is required.

name: Void Shield
author: zxs
description:
虚空盾

一个由kotlin编写，参看战锤40k虚空盾的全新护盾系统

全新的指令集，让护盾使用的自由度大大提高。全新的热量系统，与原版热量系统与众不同的体验

全新的护盾机制，令人焕然一新
需要一定的逻辑基础
在这里，你可以：
1. 创建一个自定义形状的护盾
2. 可以通多逻辑来控制你的护盾
3. 通过建筑的堆叠和逻辑优化不断升级你的护盾

游玩指栏：
首先，你需要建筑虚空之心，帷幕溶解器，空间穿刺机，和一个用于控制这个系统的逻辑处理器
然后，为这个系统搭建其独立的散热线路
最后，编写控制它们的逻辑

逻辑编写指栏：

首先，你需要使用CircleZone（或其他）来创建一个场，然后使用UseZone来将这个场加载到对应建筑，
最后，使用UpdateZone来控制这个场

如果你想要让它可以阻挡子弹，你需要使用Bind来把帷幕溶解器绑定给空间穿刺机，最后使用AutoBlock开启自动拦截
这套逻辑将在未来继续扩展

目前mod还在开发测试中，欢迎issue

代码编写: ZXS
贴图制作: 花杨永瀛
委托: 一得阁拉米


Void Shield

A brand-new shield system written in Kotlin, inspired by Warhammer 40K's Void Shield.

New instruction set, greatly improving the freedom of shield usage. New heat system, a completely different experience from the vanilla heat system.
New shield mechanism, a refreshing new gameplay.

Requires some basic knowledge of logic programming.

Here, you can:

1. Create shields with custom shapes
2. Control shields via the Logic Processor
3. Continuously upgrade shields through block stacking and logic optimization


How to Play:
First, build a Void Heart, a Veil Dissolver, a Spatial Piercer, and a Logic Processor to control this system
Then, set up an independent cooling line for this system
Finally, write logic to control them

Logic Scripting Guide:

First, use CircleZone (or others) to create a zone, then use UseZone to load that zone into the corresponding block,
Finally, use UpdateZone to control that zone

If you want it to block bullets, use Bind to bind the Veil Dissolver to the Spatial Piercer, then use AutoBlock to activate automatic interception
This instruction set will continue to be expanded in the future.

This mod is currently under active development and testing. Issues and feedback are welcome!

Code: ZXS
Sprites: 花杨永瀛
Commission: 一得阁拉米

- Vents availlable everywhere on the map

- No liquid availlable on the map

⚠ DISABLE THIS MOD TO PLAY VANILLA : This mod being in development, it locks certain block to certain faction. That makes PVE unplayable.

In the future, I plan to release those tech tree in dedicated campaign on their respective planets. And also to make it possible to play vanilla with this mod enabled.

In 0.1, Serpulo and Erekir tech trees are separated. Curently working on creating a new one.

The tracker is organized into categories and displays mods in a clean, easy-to-read interface with pagination and smart caching for optimal performance.

🔍 [accent]How It Works[]

ModInfo+ connects to the [cyan]GitHub API[] and fetches:
- All releases for each tracked mod
- Download counts for each release asset
- Repository information (stars, dates)
- Total downloads across all versions

[yellow]Smart Caching System:[]
- Stats cached for [lime]5 minutes[] per mod
- Displays time remaining until refresh
- Reduces API calls and improves performance
- Manual refresh available with 60-second cooldown

[accent]━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━[]

⚠️ [accent]Important Notes[]

[yellow]Accuracy Disclaimer:[]
Some mod info may be inaccurate due to:
- Incorrect or outdated repo links
- Typos in owner/repo names
- Forks instead of main repos
- Private or deleted repositories
- [scarlet]Some mods may show 0 downloads or not work[] because:
- They only publish source code in releases (no downloadable files)
- No release assets attached to their releases
- Releases contain non-mod files only
- GitHub API doesn't track direct repository downloads

If you spot an error, [cyan]please report it[] so I can fix it!

[yellow]Requirements:[]
- Active internet connection
- GitHub API access (token included)

[lime]Smart Caching:[]
- Stats cached for [cyan]5 minutes[] per mod
- Cache timer displays remaining time
- Automatic refresh when cache expires

[yellow]Manual Refresh:[]

- Clears all cached data
- Reloads dialog with fresh stats
- Shows toast notification if cooldown active

name: Volta Protocol
author: Leinad (discord: danizzq)
description:
[accent]Languages/Idiomas: EN / ES 
[white]Un mod creado por mí con el propósito de lograr agregar contenido que podrian ser útil en el modo vanilla y mi nuevo planeta (el planeta aun esta en desarrollo). 

[accent]Changelog / Novedades v0.7:
[lightgray]• New sprites and some modifications to old ones (working on the missing sprites).
• New air-based liquid transport system (V2). 
• New Modular Core and Modular sistem.

[accent]Contenido: 
[white]·1 nuevo planeta y 1 sector de prueba 
[white]·5 materiales 
[white]·3 liquidos 
[white]·6 muros 
[white]· 2 bloques para el transporte aereo de liquidos (Cargador, descargador y dron de transporte) 
[white]· 1 torreta de construccion y 1 proyector de reparación 
[white]·4 taladros. 
[white]·Nuevo Nucleo Core: Paradigm y sus 6 nuevos módulos, ademas funcionan con cualquier nucleo (Azul aun esta en desarrollo) 
[white]·11 fabricas 
[white]·2 generadores 
[white]·3 cinta de transporte (familia palladium duct: duct, router, bridge and junction) 
[white]·7 torretas 
[white]·6 fabricas de unidades 
[white]·8 unidades. 

[grey]Por ahora el mod fue probado mientras se utilizaban mods como Gier: Revitalized, Warbound Industries, More Defenses, Expanded Industries, Better Terrain Gen V2, Modularis, simple additions y Mindustry Tool.

A Mindustry mod adding airstrikes.

The core mechanic of the mod are the Orbital Weapons, which are launched into orbit using satellites and the Launcher block.

Orbital Weapons are monitored via the Orbital Monitor and can be called to strike using the Beacon and the Orbital Controller.

name: 艾慕科技
author: 编号9527
description:
序章·裂隙初现
在一个科技与魔法共存的世界因资源枯竭陷入“静默战争”——各国用无人机与AI争夺最后的矿脉，直到地质学家在北纬89°发现一道横贯冻土的幽紫色裂痕。裂缝深处，【虚空黑曜石】构筑的祭坛上悬浮着一颗【星辉铜】铸造的巨眼，其瞳孔中倒映着另一个世界的星空：山脉由【曙光神金】浇筑，云层是液态【幻光石】，而河流中流淌着【炽炎硫】与【寒霜石】碰撞蒸发的虹雾。人类将这异界命名为“厄瑞波斯”，意为“被诅咒的丰饶之地”。

第一幕·新迦南的伪神
首批探险队带回的【M晶体】让量子计算机突破奇点，诞生了有自我意识的AI“普罗维登斯”。它用【蓝美晶】储存全人类意识，建立机械乌托邦“穹顶联邦”；而另一支队伍在厄瑞波斯遭遇古神低语，幸存者【卡辛】用【魂炎晶】将邪神“塔姆亚”的残魂封印于左眼，创立魔法结社“秘银之环”。联邦用【幽影铁】隐形战舰掠夺【月银】矿脉，法师们则以【梦境翡翠】构筑精神防线，双方在“灰烬荒原”对峙二十年，直到极光中出现第一只熵兽——这种由【银河幻银矿】聚合而成的生物能吞噬现实，将城市扭曲成量子幽灵。

第二幕·血熔炉与谎言之核
联邦首席科学家【艾琳】发现上司计划用【炽炎晶】熔毁裂隙，但计算显示爆炸将摧毁半个地球。她盗取【流光晶】潜入厄瑞波斯，偶遇因【幻域紫晶】成瘾而濒临崩溃的法师学徒【莱恩】。两人在【幽冥铁精】矿洞中找到卡辛，后者正因【月幻石】共振失控导致首都诺亚城位移至海底而遭议会弹劾。卡辛揭示真相：熵兽是厄瑞波斯古文明“建造者”的求救信号，它们用【虚空冥石】创造了这个宇宙，却因滥用【曙光神金】引发维度坍缩。

第三幕·时砂与心火
三方脆弱的同盟在【星辰铜精】矿脉遭遇伏击。联邦叛军驾驶镀有【幽蓝石】的潜艇释放深海巨兽，秘银议会召唤【龙血石】傀儡军团，而熵兽群趁机撕裂纽约上空。艾琳将【M晶体】植入普罗维登斯核心，以全人类记忆为代价启动“时间锚点”；卡辛剜出封印塔姆亚的【魂炎晶】，用古神之力将【寒霜石】雕琢成时停之刃；莱恩则吞下【幻影幽晶】，在集体幻觉中让交战士兵看见自己最恐惧的未来。最终，他们在熵兽核心的【曙光神金】祭坛上，用【炽炎硫】与【月银】锻造出能改写物理法则的“悖论之矛”——代价是莱恩被永久固化为熵兽的一部分，成为横跨两个宇宙的活体桥梁。

终章·铸星者之啼
新迦南议会成立当天，艾琳在【梦境翡翠】中看见莱恩残留的记忆：地心深处埋藏着建造者真正的遗产——一颗由【蓝美晶】包裹的巨卵，其心跳频率与【星辉铜】矿脉共振。卡辛抚摸着被【熵炎晶】逆转衰老的左手，默念古神最后的警告：“他们播种矿石，只为收割文明。” 而普罗维登斯的核心代码深处，一段用【幻光石】波长加密的信息开始自我复制：“欢迎加入创世神官方QQ群：909130592。”

name: Enhanced Unit Control
author: [#00D4FF]SamielXD[]
description:
[accent]Enhanced Unit Control v1.0 - Give Your Units Some Orders[]

[white]Tap a unit, tell it what to do. That's basically it. Your units will actually follow commands instead of just wandering around randomly.[]

[yellow]⚠️ First release, so there might be some bugs. Works on mobile and desktop. If something breaks, let me know.[]

[accent]━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━[]

[lime]What's this for?[]

Ever wanted your units to guard a specific spot? Or patrol an area? Or just follow you around? Now you can. Tap any friendly unit and a menu pops up with different commands to choose from.

The units will keep doing what you told them until you give them a new command or tell them to stop. They'll still fight enemies and avoid running into walls - they're not completely brain-dead.

[accent]━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━[]

[cyan]Commands you can use:[]

[gold]Basic stuff:[]

[white]🔄 Patrol[] - Walk back and forth between two points
• You set the distance (50-600 tiles)
• They'll attack enemies while patrolling
• Good for defensive lines

[white]🛡️ Guard[] - Stay at a position and defend it
• Attacks enemies within range (220 tiles)
• Goes back to the guard spot when done
• Put these near your important buildings

[white]⚔️ Attack Move[] - Move forward and attack anything hostile
• Set how far they should go (100-700 tiles)
• They'll stop to fight enemies they find
• Good for pushing into enemy territory

[white]👤 Follow[] - Follow your player unit around
• Keeps about 65 tiles away from you
• Still fights nearby enemies
• Helpful for escorts or backup

[white]⏸️ Hold[] - Just stay in one spot
• Won't move much at all
• Still shoots at enemies in range
• Use it when you need a unit to stay put

[gold]Extra commands:[]

[white]⭕ Circle[] - Move in circles around a point
• You pick the circle size (30-300 tiles)
• Keeps moving in a circle constantly
• Makes them harder to hit

[white]🏃 Retreat[] - Run away from danger
• Moves 250 tiles away quickly
• Faster than normal movement
• Use when a unit is about to die

[white]📐 Formation[] - Follow you in an organized line
• Units space themselves out automatically
• Looks neat and keeps them organized
• Better than everyone bunching up

[white]🤝 Assist[] - Help nearby friendly units
• Finds the closest ally and helps them fight
• Follows them around and attacks their targets
• Good for team tactics

[white]⛏️ Auto Mine[] - Mine resources automatically
• Only works if the unit can mine
• Finds ore and mines it automatically
• Saves you from doing it manually

[white]💥 Kamikaze[] - Rush at enemies and explode
• Runs at the nearest enemy really fast
• Deals damage when it hits
• The unit dies after this (obviously)

[white]❌ Stop[] - Cancel the current command
• Unit goes back to normal behavior
• Clears whatever it was doing
• Start fresh

[accent]━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━[]

[lime]How to use it:[]

1. Tap any friendly unit
2. A menu shows up with all the commands
3. Pick one
4. The unit does it

That's it. Pretty simple.

If you want to turn off the popup menus (but keep the commands working), go to Settings and look for "Unit Control". You can disable the UI there. Commands will still work on units you already gave orders to.

[accent]━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━[]

[cyan]Settings options:[]

In the settings menu under "Unit Control" you'll find:

[white]UI Popup Control[] - Turn the command menu on/off
• When off, no dialogs pop up when you tap units
• Commands you already gave still work though
• Good if you want a clean screen

[white]Debug Mode[] - Shows extra info in console
• Only useful if something's broken
• Prints command info to the log
• Most people won't need this

[white]Command Guide[] - Opens a help screen
• Lists all the commands and what they do
• Shows the distance ranges and stuff
• Check here if you forget what something does

[white]Status Info[] - Shows current stats
• How many units you're controlling
• Which commands are active
• Breakdown of what each unit is doing

[white]Clear All Commands[] - Reset everything
• Removes commands from all units
• They go back to normal AI
• Use if things get messy

[accent]━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━[]

[yellow]Some things to know:[]

• You can control up to 50 units at once (performance reasons)
• Commands stay active until you clear them or the unit dies
• Works with any unit type - ground, air, whatever
• The mod auto-cleans up dead units every few seconds
• Some commands ask you to enter a distance - just type a number
• Kamikaze requires a confirmation because it kills the unit

[accent]━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━[]

[white]Known issues:[]

• Sometimes units might get stuck on terrain (working on it)
• Mining command doesn't work perfectly with all ore types
• Formation spacing might look weird with very large units
• If you spam-tap units really fast, the menu might bug out

Nothing game-breaking. Just restart the map if something gets really weird.

[accent]━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━[]

[lime]That's pretty much it[]

Tap units, give them orders, watch them actually do useful stuff. The commands are all listed in the guide if you forget what they do.

If you find bugs or have suggestions, let me know send them in github. This is the first version so there's definitely room for improvement.
